item.title: One of these eggs is not like the others!
item.description: One egg stands out from the rest and the reason why is fascinating.

media:content.media:title: One of these eggs is not like the others!
media:content.media:description: One egg stands out from the rest and the reason why is fascinating.

item.title: What is happening to this egg!
item.description: Something strange is happening inside this egg and you will not believe the outcome.

media:content.media:title: What is happening to this egg!
media:content.media:description: Something strange is happening inside this egg and you will not believe the outcome.

item.title: Mimicking rattle snakes!
item.description: See how this clever animal mimics rattlesnakes to scare off predators and stay safe.

media:content.media:title: Mimicking rattle snakes!
media:content.media:description: See how this clever animal mimics rattlesnakes to scare off predators and stay safe.

item.title: Silver Babies!
item.description: A close up look at stunning silver babies and the surprise they bring.

media:content.media:title: Silver Babies!
media:content.media:description: A close up look at stunning silver babies and the surprise they bring.

item.title: Egg protection mode!
item.description: Watch as this tiny creature switches into full egg protection mode to guard its future.

media:content.media:title: Egg protection mode!
media:content.media:description: Watch as this tiny creature switches into full egg protection mode to guard its future.

item.title: What happens after she lays eggs.
item.description: Let us show you what really happens after she lays her eggs and the process that follows behind the scenes.

media:content.media:title: What happens after she lays eggs.
media:content.media:description: Let us show you what really happens after she lays her eggs and the process that follows behind the scenes.

item.title: What lesson do you think I learned here? Some of you may remember the leaky clutch. Is there anything I do differently now? Take a guess!
item.description: After dealing with the infamous leaky clutch situation I reflect on the hard lesson it taught me and challenge you to guess what I changed.

media:content.media:title: What lesson do you think I learned here? Some of you may remember the leaky clutch. Is there anything I do differently now? Take a guess!
media:content.media:description: After dealing with the infamous leaky clutch situation I reflect on the hard lesson it taught me and challenge you to guess what I changed.

item.title: The surprise eggs!
item.description: Get ready because the eggs brought a surprise we did not expect.

media:content.media:title: The surprise eggs!
media:content.media:description: Get ready because the eggs brought a surprise we did not expect.

item.title: After she lays eggs!
item.description: Here is what happens next after she finally lays her eggs.

media:content.media:title: After she lays eggs!
media:content.media:description: Here is what happens next after she finally lays her eggs.

item.title: This was risky!
item.description: I pushed the limits and things could have gone very wrong in this intense risky moment.

media:content.media:title: This was risky!
media:content.media:description: I pushed the limits and things could have gone very wrong in this intense risky moment.

item.title: Feeding my pet black widow!
item.description: Feeding my pet black widow as she hunts and shows just how powerful this tiny predator really is.

media:content.media:title: Feeding my pet black widow!
media:content.media:description: Feeding my pet black widow as she hunts and shows just how powerful this tiny predator really is.

item.title: We set out to help local burrowing owls!
item.description: We took on a new mission to support and protect our local burrowing owls in their natural habitat.

media:content.media:title: We set out to help local burrowing owls!
media:content.media:description: We took on a new mission to support and protect our local burrowing owls in their natural habitat.

item.title: You know you love this Hognose!
item.description: You already know this Hognose is about to steal your heart with its attitude and charm.

media:content.media:title: You know you love this Hognose!
media:content.media:description: You already know this Hognose is about to steal your heart with its attitude and charm.
